M-023.NAME: handshake-anomaly-detector
M-023.owns: handshake observation, endpoint metadata persistence, delegation to M-031 for roaming-vs-abuse decisions, and M-081 alert creation for confirmed abuse events

exports.fn-observe-peer-handshake: Records last-seen handshake and endpoint data for a device-linked peer
exports.fn-apply-anti-abuse-decision: Persists anti-abuse audit events, creates M-081 alerts for confirmed abuse, and invokes soft enforcement only when configured by M-031

M-023.hotspot: H-009: Handshake anomaly detection must avoid false positives on mobile roaming; raw endpoint changes are no longer sufficient evidence.
M-023.phase-78-evidence: backend/tests/test_handshake_anomaly_detector.py proves confirmed ping-pong creates exactly one M-081 alert while observe-mode enforcement remains unchanged.
